
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Earth Rat|kanji=ๆๅญ|romaji=tsuchinoe nezumi|onyomi=boshi|p=wรนzว|w=wu-tzลญ|mi=uโตโต tsษจ|y=mou6 zi2|j=mou6 zi2|ci=mษu tsi|mc=mษu tsi|oc-bs=mษ tsi|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}
'''Yang Earth Rat''' (ๆๅญ, ใคใกใฎใใญใใผใฉใฎใญใใฟใใผใฉใฎใญใใผใ, tsuchinoe-ne, bodo-no-nezumi, bodo-no-ze, boshi) is one element of the {{ill|Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja|Sexagenary cycle|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.

It is the 25th combination in the Sexagenary Cycle Comprehensive, preceded by {{ill|Ding Hai|ja|1=Yin Fire Pig|2=ja|ไธไบฅ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ding Hai|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and followed by {{ill|Ki Chou|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|ๅทฑไธ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ki Chou|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the {{ill|Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|ja|้ฐ้ฝไบ่กๆๆณ|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|1=Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory|qq=}}, the {{ill|Wu|ja|ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|lt=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|2=ja|3=ๆ|4=zh|5=ๆ|1=Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wu|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsuchinoe (ๆ)|qq=}} of the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Ten Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} represents yang earth, while the {{ill|Rat (zodiac)|en|Rat (zodiac)|qid=Q721997|lt=Rat (ๅญ)|1=Rat (zodiac)}} of the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Twelve Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} represents yang water, and according to the principle of mutual overcoming ({{ill|Sลkoku|ja|็ธๅ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sลkoku|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=ไบ่กๆๆณ|1=Wuxing (Chinese philosophy)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q218652}}; earth overcomes water).

==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Earth Rat (ๆๅญ)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): wรนzว
** Cantonese (Jyutping): mou6 zi2
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Tsuchinoe-ne
***Kunyomi 2: Bodo-no-ne
***Onyomi 1: boshi
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): muja (๋ฌด์)
** Vietnamese (Hรกn-Viแปt): Mแบญu Tรฝ

==Years of Yang Earth Rat==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 28 when divided by 60 is considered a Yang Earth Rat {{ill|Year|en|Year|qid=Q577|lt=year|1=Year}}.
{| class="wikitable"
|+'''Year of Yang Earth Rat'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 28|en|AD 28|qid=Q24816|lt=28 AD|1=AD 28}}
* {{ill|AD 88|en|AD 88|qid=Q24844|lt=88 AD|1=AD 88}}
* {{ill|AD 148|en|AD 148|qid=Q31654|lt=148 AD|1=AD 148}}
* {{ill|208|en|208|qid=Q31268|lt=208 AD|1=208}}
* {{ill|268|en|268|qid=Q32702|lt=268 AD|1=268}}
* {{ill|328|en|328|qid=Q32570|lt=328 AD|1=328}}
* {{ill|388|en|388|qid=Q48099|lt=388 AD|1=388}}
* {{ill|448|en|448|qid=Q33636|lt=448 AD|1=448}}
* {{ill|508|en|508|qid=Q31027|lt=508 AD|1=508}}
* {{ill|568|en|568|qid=Q33422|lt=568 AD|1=568}}
* {{ill|628|en|628|qid=Q30592|lt=628 AD|1=628}}
* {{ill|688|en|688|qid=Q30443|lt=688 AD|1=688}}
* {{ill|748|en|748|qid=Q23621|lt=748 AD|1=748}}
* {{ill|AD 808|en|AD 808|qid=Q30366|lt=808 AD|1=AD 808}}
* {{ill|868|en|868|qid=Q25061|lt=868 AD|1=868}}
* {{ill|928|en|928|qid=Q24297|lt=928 AD|1=928}}
* {{ill|988|en|988|qid=Q23475|lt=988 AD|1=988}}
|
* {{ill|1048|en|1048|qid=Q19359|lt=1048 AD|1=1048}}
* {{ill|1108|en|1108|qid=Q19514|lt=1108 AD|1=1108}}
* {{ill|1168|en|1168|qid=Q19679|lt=1168 AD|1=1168}}
* {{ill|1228|en|1228|qid=Q5410|lt=1228 AD|1=1228}}
* {{ill|1288|en|1288|qid=Q5550|lt=1288 AD|1=1288}}
* {{ill|1348|en|1348|qid=Q6085|lt=1348 AD|1=1348}}
* {{ill|1408|en|1408|qid=Q6138|lt=1408 AD|1=1408}}
* {{ill|1468|en|1468|qid=Q6564|lt=1468 AD|1=1468}}
* {{ill|1528|en|1528|qid=Q6415|lt=1528 AD|1=1528}}
* {{ill|1588|en|1588|qid=Q6757|lt=1588 AD|1=1588}}
* {{ill|1648|en|1648|qid=Q6941|lt=1648 AD|1=1648}}
* {{ill|1708|en|1708|qid=Q6846|lt=1708 AD|1=1708}}
* {{ill|1768|en|1768|qid=Q7675|lt=1768 AD|1=1768}}
* {{ill|1828|en|1828|qid=Q7570|lt=1828 AD|1=1828}}
* {{ill|1888|en|1888|qid=Q7829|lt=1888 AD|1=1888}}
* {{ill|1948|en|1948|qid=Q5165|lt=1948 AD|1=1948}}
|
* {{ill|2008|en|2008|qid=Q2004|lt=2008 AD|1=2008}}
* {{ill|2068 AD|ja|2068ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2068 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2060ๅนดไปฃ|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2128 AD|ja|2128ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2128 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22ไธ็ด|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2188 AD|ja|2188ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2188 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22ไธ็ด|1=22nd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2248 AD|ja|2248ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2248 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23ไธ็ด|1=23rd century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2308 AD|ja|2308ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2308 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24ไธ็ด|1=24th century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2368 AD|ja|2368ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2368 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24ไธ็ด|1=24th century|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2428 AD|ja|2428ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2428 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2488 AD|ja|2488ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2488 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2548 AD|ja|2548ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2548 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2608 AD|ja|2608ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2608 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2668 AD|ja|2668ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2668 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2728 AD|ja|2728ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2728 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=3ๅๅนด็ด|1=3rd millennium|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q26224}}
* {{ill|2788 AD|ja|2788ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2788 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2848 AD|ja|2848ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2848 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2908 AD|ja|2908ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2908 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2968 AD|ja|2968ๅนด|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2968 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

==Months of Yang Earth Rat==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose last digit is 0 or 5 (when the Heavenly Stems are {{ill|Kล|ja|ๅบ|1=Kanoe (ๅบ)|lt=Kanoe (ๅบ)|2=ja|3=ๅบ|4=zh|5=ๅบ|1=Kanoe (ๅบ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kล|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoe (ๅบ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Otsu|ja|ไน|1=Kinoto (ไน)|lt=Kinoto (ไน)|2=ja|3=ไน|4=zh|5=ไน|1=Kinoto (ไน)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Otsu|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoto (ไน)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|November|en|November|qid=Q125|lt=November|1=November}} is considered the Yang Earth Rat {{ill|Month|en|Month|qid=Q5151|lt=month (calendar)|1=Month}}. However, the month referred to here may also be based on the {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|ๆงๆฆ|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Lunisolar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} or on a seasonal month (from {{ill|Daxue (solar term)|en|Daxue (solar term)|qid=Q337815|lt=Taisetsu|1=Daxue (solar term)}} to the day before {{ill|Xiaohan|en|Xiaohan|qid=Q1190989|lt=Shลkan|1=Xiaohan}}).

==Days of Yang Earth Rat==
The selection of auspicious days for Yang Earth Rat is as follows.
=== Selected Day ===
The Yang Earth Rat day is the 5th day of {{ill|Tenpลgure|ja|ๅๆนๆฎ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenpลgure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405067}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Earth Rat|qq=ja|ๆๅญ|version=84827483|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1062052|af|Aardrot (astrologie)|cdo|Muรด-cแนณฬ|de|Erde-Ratte|fr|Rat de terre|hak|Vรบ-chแนณฬ|ja|ๆๅญ|ko|๋ฌด์|nds|Eer-Rรถtt|vi|Mแบญu Tรฝ|za|Fouhceij|zh-min-nan|Bลอ-chรบ|zh-yue|ๆๅญ|zh|ๆๅญ|zh-min-nan|Bรณอ-chรฎn|cdo|Tsuch-cแนณฬde|nds|Erd-Rรถttvi|de|Yang Earth Rat|af|Aarderot (astrologie)|de|Erde-Ratteen|en|Earth Rat|fr|Rat de terreboishak|it|Tsu-chแนณฬid|za|Mouzceij|ar|Yang Earth Rat}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
